name: @marwansaab/obsidian-cli-mcp
description: Cross-platform MCP server bridging MCP clients to the Obsidian Integrated CLI binary on macOS, Linux, and Windows hosts. Ships obsidian_exec (generic CLI bridge), help (progressive-disclosure docs), read_note (typed read tool), read_heading (typed heading-body read tool), write_note (typed direct-fs-write create/overwrite tool — bypasses the upstream argv-IPC defect per ADR-009), delete_note (typed delete tool with safety defaults), read_property (typed surgical frontmatter-property read), and find_by_property (typed value-to-file lookup over frontmatter).
